title: Always Cooked Food
description: A datapack that makes animals always drop cooked food when killed instead of raw food. (Quality of life)
body:
Alters loot tables so that animals will always drop cooked food regardless if it was set on fire before being killed.

This is a quality of life (QOL) datapack.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


_Changes:_

- minecraft:cow drops minecraft:cooked_beef instead of minecraft:beef
- minecraft:sheep drops minecraft:cooked_mutton instead of minecraft:mutton
- minecraft:chicken drops minecraft:cooked_chicken instead of minecraft:chicken
- minecraft:pig drops minecraft:cooked_porkchop instead of minecraft:porkchop
- minecraft:rabbit drops minecraft:cooked_rabbit instead of minecraft:rabbit
- minecraft:cod drops minecraft:cooked_cod instead of minecraft:cod
- minecraft:salmon drops minecraft:cooked_salmon instead of minecraft:salmon
- minecraft:hoglin drops minecraft:cooked_porkchop instead of minecraft:porkchop
- minecraft:mooshroom drops minecraft:cooked_beef instead of minecraft:beef
- minecraft:guardian has a chance to drop minecraft:cooked_cod instead of having a chance to drop minecraft:cod
- minecraft:elder_guardian has a chance to drop minecraft:cooked_cod instead of having a chance to drop minecraft:cod

Nothing more that's worth explaining.

have fun i guess
